title: Fix randomize 'invalid empty bit-vector literal' and ignored `with`

features.name: assert with constrained randomize using with clause
features.description: Code should include an assert statement that calls randomize() on a variable with a constraint block via the 'with' keyword

features.name: system function call inside randomize with constraint
features.description: Code should include a system function call ($countones, $onehot, etc.) placed inside a randomize() with constraint block

features.name: array bit access in randomize constraint
features.description: Code should include an array bit-select access expression used inside a randomize() with constraint
